entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop grown in semi-arid tropics susceptible to waterlogging

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low annual precipitation and specific soil orders

entities.name: SOIL ORDERS
entities.description: Categories of soil including Inceptisols, Entisols, Alfisols, Vertisols, Mixed soils, and Aridisols

entities.name: WATERLOGGING
entities.description: A state where soil reaches saturation at submergence, creating anaerobic conditions

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: Geographic region where pigeonpea waterlogging causes significant yield loss

entities.name: YIELD LOSS
entities.description: Reduction in crop productivity caused by waterlogging stress

entities.name: ANAEROBIC CONDITION
entities.description: Oxygen-deficient state in the root zone caused by soil saturation

entities.name: PLANT WITHERING
entities.description: A symptom of waterlogging stress

entities.name: LEAF CHLOROSIS
entities.description: Yellowing of leaves due to waterlogging stress

entities.name: STUNTED GROWTH
entities.description: Reduced plant growth resulting from waterlogging stress

entities.name: LOWERED PHOTOSYNTHETIC RATE
entities.description: Reduction in the rate of photosynthesis due to waterlogging

entities.name: PLANT MORTALITY
entities.description: Death of the plant caused by severe waterlogging stress

entities.name: AERENCHYMA CELLS
entities.description: Morphological adaptation involving gas-filled tissues to survive waterlogging

entities.name: LENTICELS
entities.description: Morphological adaptation for gas exchange during waterlogging

entities.name: ADVENTITIOUS ROOTS
entities.description: Morphological adaptation involving roots growing from non-root tissue

entities.name: PROLINE
entities.description: Biochemical modification produced in response to waterlogging

entities.name: PEROXIDASE
entities.description: Enzyme produced as a biochemical modification to waterlogging

entities.name: SUPEROXIDE DISMUTASE
entities.description: Enzyme produced as a biochemical modification to waterlogging

entities.name: ETHYLENE
entities.description: Hormone produced as a biochemical modification to waterlogging

entities.name: ALCOHOL DEHYDROGENASE
entities.description: Enzyme produced as a biochemical modification to waterlogging

entities.name: WATERLOGGING TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand and recover from waterlogging stress

entities.name: SCREENING PROTOCOL
entities.description: A standardized procedure to evaluate waterlogging tolerance

entities.name: SINGLE POD DESCENT METHOD
entities.description: A breeding strategy used to develop waterlogging tolerance

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding technique using genetic markers to select for waterlogging tolerance

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION ADVANCEMENT TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to accelerate the breeding cycle for waterlogging tolerance
